response.original_title: Stratford Festival: A Midsummer Night’s Dream
response.overview: Magic, mischief and moonlight  Strange things happen in the woods by night, with neither spirit nor mortal safe from the wiles of the trickster Puck. For mismatched lovers, romance runs delightfully amok, but true love triumphs at dawn.
response.tagline: “It seems to me that yet we sleep, we dream.”
response.title: Stratford Festival: A Midsummer Night’s Dream
